on_screen_text:
The fastest route to studying abroad
Take the test from anywhere
Finish it in under an hour
Get results in 2 days
duolingo english test
summary: This ad promotes the Duolingo English Test as a fast, convenient way to study abroad. It highlights key benefits like remote testing, under-an-hour completion, and two-day results. The video features the Duolingo mascot interacting with people to build brand engagement.
